text.title: Staging Smoke Checklist by Surface Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: expect is empty (goal-shaped item); sign_off fields empty; build_sha empty.

list.pattern: more than 3 surfaces stuffed in; items silently skipped at run time.
items phrased as goals ('verify login works') rather than click-expect.
sign-off line absent or stub; gate becomes opt-in.
checklist lives in Notion or Slack; cannot be reproduced from a checkout.
